channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ITDCEM] Cemindia Projects Board Approves Q4/FY26 Results, Appoints Director & Auditor
item.description:
Cemindia Projects Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 29, 2026, approved the audited financial results for Q4 and the full year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from auditors. The Board also decided not to propose any dividend for FY26. Key decisions included convening the 48th Annual General Meeting on June 27, 2026, appointing Mr. Abizer Shabbir Diwanji as an Additional Independent Director for three years, and recommending Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP as Statutory Auditors for five years. Additionally, the Board approved alterations to the Articles of Association regarding document execution.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 with unmodified opinion.
  • No dividend was proposed for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • 48th Annual General Meeting to be held on June 27, 2026.
  • Mr. Abizer Shabbir Diwanji appointed as an Additional Independent Director.
  • Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP recommended as Statutory Auditors for 5 years.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ITD CEMENTATION INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WAAREEENER] Waaree Energies Board Approves FY26 Results, ₹2 Dividend, ₹10,000 Cr Fundraise
item.description:
Waaree Energies Ltd.'s Board of Directors approved the Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a final dividend of ₹2 per equity share (20%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved raising funds up to ₹10,000 Crores through various modes, including QIP, by issuing equity shares, NCDs, or other convertible securities. Other approvals included a postal ballot process, the acquisition of Waaree Semicon Private Limited by a wholly-owned subsidiary, and the re-appointment of Cost and Internal Auditors for FY27.

  • Board approved FY26 audited financial results.
  • Recommended ₹2 final dividend per equity share.
  • Approved fundraise up to ₹10,000 Cr via QIP/other modes.
  • Subsidiary to acquire Waaree Semicon Private Limited.
  • Re-appointed Cost and Internal Auditors for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Waaree Energies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ITDCEM] Cemindia Projects: FY26 Results Approved, No Dividend, New Director
item.description:
Cemindia Projects Ltd's Board approved the audited financial results for Q4 and the full year ended March 31, 2026, on April 29, 2026, with an unmodified audit opinion from Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP. The Board did not propose any dividend for the financial year. The 48th Annual General Meeting is scheduled for June 27, 2026. Additionally, Mr. Abizer Shabbir Diwanji was appointed as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director for a three-year term, subject to shareholder approval. The Board also recommended the re-appointment of Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP as Statutory Auditors for five years and approved alterations to the Articles of Association concerning document execution, both subject to shareholder approval.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 with unmodified opinion.
  • No dividend was proposed for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Mr. Abizer Shabbir Diwanji appointed as an Independent Director for three years.
  • Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP recommended for re-appointment as auditors.
  • 48th Annual General Meeting to be held on June 27, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ITD CEMENTATION INDIA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDGN] Indegene Board Approves Q4/FY26 Results, Recommends ₹2.25 Dividend
item.description:
Indegene Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹2.25 per equity share for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, which will be paid within 30 days after shareholder approval at the ensuing Annual General Meeting. Additionally, the board approved allotments under the ESOP Scheme 2020 and RSU Scheme 2020. Significant amendments were also approved for 19 policies under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, covering areas like material subsidiary, whistle-blower, insider trading, related party transactions, and corporate governance.

  • Board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹2.25 per equity share for FY26.
  • Approved allotment under ESOP Scheme 2020 and RSU Scheme 2020.
  • Approved amendments to 19 policies under SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indegene Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ITDCEM] Cemindia Board Approves FY26 Results, Appoints New Director & Auditor
item.description:
Cemindia Projects Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 29, 2026, to approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP. The Board also decided not to propose any dividend for FY26. Key decisions included convening the 48th Annual General Meeting on June 27, 2026, appointing Mr. Abizer Shabbir Diwanji as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director for three years, and recommending Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP as Statutory Auditors for five years, both subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, the Board approved alterations to the Articles of Association regarding document execution.

  • Board approved Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY26 with unmodified opinion.
  • No dividend was proposed for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Mr. Abizer Shabbir Diwanji appointed as Additional Independent Director.
  • Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP recommended as Statutory Auditors for 5 years.
  • 48th Annual General Meeting scheduled for June 27, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ITD CEMENTATION INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HCLTECH] HCLTech partners with DP World Tour for digital transformation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

HCLTech has announced a multi-year partnership with the DP World Tour, becoming its Official Digital Experience Partner and an Official Marketing Partner. HCLTech will lead a program to transform the Tour's global digital presence, focusing on fan-centric innovation. This includes designing and delivering next-generation digital experience platforms, such as the DP World Tour website and app, to enhance how fans engage with golf. As an Official Marketing Partner, HCLTech will have partner status at five DP World Tour tournaments each season, along with significant hospitality and digital activations. This collaboration aims to amplify HCLTech's global brand presence, particularly in Europe, while providing the DP World Tour with advanced digital solutions to engage its worldwide fanbase.

  • HCLTech is the Official Digital Experience Partner of the DP World Tour.
  • HCLTech will lead a multi-year program to transform the Tour's global digital presence.
  • The partnership focuses on fan-centric innovation and next-generation digital platforms.
  • HCLTech will also serve as an Official Marketing Partner with presence at five tournaments.
  • The collaboration expands HCLTech's global brand presence, especially in Europe.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HCL TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [NEETUYOSHI] Neetu Yoshi to raise ₹27.48 Cr via 2.64M convertible warrants
item.description:
Neetu Yoshi Ltd's Board of Directors approved raising funds by issuing 2,642,400 convertible warrants at an offer price of ₹104.00 each on a preferential basis/private placement. These warrants, totaling approximately ₹27.48 crore, will be convertible into 2,642,400 equity shares of face value ₹5/- each. The issuance is subject to approval from shareholders and the Stock Exchange. An Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EOGM) is scheduled for May 25, 2026, at 3:00 PM via video conferencing to seek shareholder approval for this fundraising and related matters. The company will provide an e-voting facility for members from May 22 to May 24, 2026.

  • Board approved raising ₹27.48 crore via convertible warrants.
  • 2.64 million convertible warrants to be issued at ₹104 each.
  • Warrants will convert into equity shares of ₹5 face value.
  • Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EOGM) on May 25, 2026, for approval.
  • E-voting facility available from May 22 to May 24, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neetu Yoshi Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [INDGN] Indegene: Trading Window Opens May 2, 2026, Post Q4/FY26 Results
item.description:
Indegene Ltd has announced the opening of its trading window for Designated Persons, effective Saturday, May 2, 2026. This decision follows the approval and declaration of the company's financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. In accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct, Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, and other Insiders are now permitted to trade in the company's equity shares until further communication. The intimation will also be posted on the company's website.

  • Indegene's trading window opens May 2, 2026.
  • Follows approval of Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • Designated Persons can now trade company shares.
  • Ensures compliance with SEBI Insider Trading norms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indegene Ltd | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [RANEHOLDIN] Rane Holdings: Aditya Ganesh Appointed Director at Rane Steering Systems
item.description:
Rane Holdings Ltd announced the appointment of Mr. Aditya Ganesh as a Director in its wholly-owned material subsidiary, Rane Steering Systems Private Limited (RSSL), effective April 29, 2026. Mr. Ganesh holds degrees in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, and an MBA from INSEAD. He is currently the Executive Director (designate) for the Steering and Linkage Division and Light Metal Castings Division of Rane (Madras) Limited. He is also a Director on the Board of ACMA and a designated partner in C S Lane Advisory LLP. Notably, he is the son of Mr. L Ganesh, who is also a Director in RSSL. The appointment complies with SEBI regulations.

  • Aditya Ganesh appointed Director in Rane Steering Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • Appointment is effective from April 29, 2026.
  • Mr. Ganesh brings strong academic and industry experience.
  • He is the son of existing RSSL Director, Mr. L Ganesh.
  • Appointment ensures compliance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RANE HOLDINGS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [INNOVACAP] Innova Captab Board to meet May 7 for Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
Innova Captab Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider, approve, and take on record the Audited (standalone and consolidated) Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities, which closed on April 1, 2026, for designated persons and their immediate relatives, will re-open 48 hours after the declaration of these financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Trading window re-opens 48 hours post results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Innova Captab Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
